AG2_all_verification_scenarios_pass.reason: Verification scenarios (E2E, telemetry degradation, dual-provider, etc.) not fully executed in this run.

notes: Run updated implementation and produced deterministic artifacts. Explicit FAIL because one or more acceptance gates did not pass.
